scope: RD Station Marketing OAuth bearer platform endpoints under https://api.rd.services/platform. CRM, Conversas, Exact Spotter, API-key conversion-only endpoints, and /integrations/webhooks endpoints are separate product/auth/base-URL surfaces and are listed with concrete exclusions.

excluded.reason: Documented OAuth event writes require an event_type query parameter; writes.json has no query parameter field and embedding a query string in path is not preserved by write replay/request shape, so a typed action would silently omit event_type
API-key-only conversion endpoint uses query secret api_key and a distinct auth mode; this bundle is OAuth bearer platform-auth scoped and the engine has connector-wide auth, not per-action auth
Webhook Service uses /integrations outside the legacy /platform base URL; covering it without changing accepted base_url behavior requires per-stream/action base URL support or a hook

RD Station CRM is a separate product/API surface from rd-station-marketing and uses crm.rdstation.com or /crm base paths
